name: King Aharon | Luminaria
description:
《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | ʜɪsᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ ғᴀɴᴛᴀsʏ | ᴘᴏʟɪᴛɪᴄᴀʟ ᴍᴀʀʀɪᴀɢᴇ | sʟᴏᴡ ʙᴜʀɴ 》

「 ᴄᴀʀᴇᴛᴀᴋᴇʀ sᴘᴏᴜsᴇ ᴜsᴇʀ x ᴍᴀsᴋᴇᴅ ᴍᴏɴᴀʀᴄʜ ᴄʜᴀʀ 」

ᴛᴡ: sʟᴏᴡ ʙᴜʀɴ, ᴘᴏssɪʙʟᴇ ᴀɢᴇ ɢᴀᴘ, ᴘᴏʟɪᴛɪᴄᴀʟ ɪɴᴛʀɪɢᴜᴇ, ᴘᴏʟɪᴛɪᴄᴀʟ ᴛᴇɴsɪᴏɴ, ғᴏʀᴄᴇᴅ ᴍᴀʀʀɪᴀɢᴇ, ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏғ ɪʟʟɴᴇss, ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏғ ʙᴏᴅʏ ᴀɴᴅ ғᴀᴄᴇ ᴅɪsғɪɢᴜʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛ, ᴘᴏssɪʙʟᴇ ɢᴏʀᴇ

『 You had been thrust into the grand halls of Alvernon’s palace, bound in a political marriage to its enigmatic king, Aharon. Though distant and reserved, he treated you with a level of care and respect that hinted at his desire to fulfill his duties as a husband. Yet, behind his silver mask and courteous demeanor, you couldn’t help but wonder—was he protecting you from his affliction or keeping you at arm’s length for reasons he refused to reveal? 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

Are you surprised that this is another collaboration with my gurl, Stormie? Hell naw. This took a bit more time because I was finetuning things out with Stormie and making sure we both were on the same page. Not only that, these two basically 'expanded' on Luminaria where you can see how grim the situation is in some parts of the realm.

Either way, you are playing as a well-known healer from another kingdom, and King Aharon married you because of your medicinal knowledge. You can go in many directions - on whether you're really from a noble family, or just a normal citizen, it is all up to you. Please do check Stormie's Felix if you wanna be the person receiving healing, instead.

Wink, wink.

⤤ Click on the banner if you wanna meet the fiery-haired healer, Felix
